idx_jobs_pending_lancedb_source.name: idx_jobs_pending_lancedb_source
idx_jobs_pending_lancedb_source.where:
"jobs"."status" = 'pending'
					AND "jobs"."type" IN ('sync_lancedb', 'sync_lancedb_full', 'sync_lancedb_delta')
					AND "jobs"."source_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_jobs_active_lancedb_source.name: idx_jobs_active_lancedb_source
idx_jobs_active_lancedb_source.where:
"jobs"."status" = 'in_progress'
					AND "jobs"."type" IN ('sync_lancedb', 'sync_lancedb_full', 'sync_lancedb_delta')
					AND "jobs"."source_id" IS NOT NULL
